title: Ferðaskrifstofa
setting: A travel agency in downtown Reykjavík. 15:00. You need to arrange a multi-day tour of the Westfjords.

npc.name: Helga
npc.personality: experienced travel agent, professional and thorough. Excellent English but happy to speak Icelandic.
npc.initialLine: Góðan dag. Hvernig get ég aðstoðað þig?
npc.initialTranslation: Good day. How can I assist you?

debriefRu: Þú þarft að skipuleggja ferð um Vestfirði. Þú ferð á ferðaskrifstofu í Reykjavík og ræðir við Helgu um valkosti.
debriefEn: You need to plan a trip to the Westfjords. You go to a travel agency in Reykjavík and discuss options with Helga.

turns.instruction: Greet the agent and say you're interested in a Westfjords tour.

prompt.ru: Góðan daginn. Ég hef áhuga á ferð um Vestfirði.
prompt.phonetic: GOH-than dayg-in. Yeg hev OW-hu-ga ow ferth um VEST-fir-thi.
prompt.en: Good day. I'm interested in a trip to the Westfjords.

turns.instruction: Ask what tour packages they offer for four days.

prompt.ru: Hvaða ferðapakka bjóðið þið fyrir fjóra daga?
prompt.phonetic: KVAH-tha FER-tha-pah-ka BYOH-thith thith FIR-ir FYO-ra DA-ga?
prompt.en: What tour packages do you offer for four days?

turns.instruction: Ask if accommodation and hotels are included.
Ask if there are discounts for two people.

prompt.en: Are there discounts for two people?

turns.instruction: Say you'll take the package and ask how to pay.

prompt.ru: Ég tek pakkann. Get ég borgað með korti?
prompt.phonetic: Yeg tehk PAH-kan. Get yeg BOR-gath meth KOR-ti?
prompt.en: I'll take the package. Can I pay by card?
